title: Postings
subtitle: Academic positions
description: Postdoc and faculty postings surfaced automatically from job boards.
descriptionZh: 自动从招聘板块抓取的博后和教职职位。

setupFields.label: Search terms
setupFields.hint: Job titles or subject areas to match.
setupFields.hintZh: 要匹配的职位名称或研究领域。

setupFields.label: Relevance threshold
setupFields.hint: Jobs below this LLM score are filtered out.
setupFields.hintZh: 低于这个 LLM 评分的职位会被过滤掉。
